untranslatable_reason: Signal requires measurement of yield spreads (0.75pp threshold), macro-economic contradiction signals (unemployment vs credit), and valuation percentile ranking—none of which are available in the allowed indicator set. The original signal is fundamentally macro/cross-asset and cannot be expressed using price-action indicators alone. Substituted RSI extremes and Bollinger Band positioning as rough proxies for valuation dislocation, but this does not capture the true intent of the signal.
translation_notes: Original signal requires: (1) yield spread vs comparable instrument >0.75pp, (2) macro indicators contradicting pricing, (3) valuation ratio in 85th+ percentile, (4) 7-day confirmation. None of these can be constructed from price/volume/technical indicators. Used bb_pct_b extremes and RSI as technical approximations for 'extreme valuation dislocation' but this is a significant simplification that loses the macro intent of the Schwager signal. Recommend obtaining external data feeds for yield curves, macro indicators, and valuation metrics for accurate implementation.
